jd_text: Operations Director – Airport Parking & Mobility We are looking to connect with experienced professionals for Senior Business Analyst roles. The ideal profile includes: Operations Director – Airport Parking & Mobility Education • Bachelor’s Degree (Engineering / Operations / Business) • Lean / Six Sigma certification preferred Candidate Profile • 8–12 years in large-scale operations management • Experience in airport operations, parking concessions, transport terminals, or facility management • Proven track record implementing SOPs and structured systems • Experience managing large teams Position Objective To design, implement, and enforce professional operational processes, systems, and controls across all parking and mobility functions, ensuring structured, KPI-driven, audit-ready performance aligned with airport-grade standards. Core Responsibilities – Operational Control • Direct oversight of 24/7 parking, shuttle, towing, enforcement, and cash operations • Ensure real-time operational visibility across all terminals • Lead peak-hour traffic deployment planning • Manage incident escalation and crisis response • Guarantee operational continuity at all times Process Development & SOP Implementation • Develop and implement comprehensive SOP manual within 90 days • Standardize shift handover, incident reporting, towing workflow, shuttle dispatch process • Establish gate malfunction and cash reconciliation procedures • Eliminate ad-hoc operational instructions KPI & Performance Monitoring • Shuttle on-time performance ≥ 95% • Gate uptime ≥ 98% • Towing response time within SLA • Revenue leakage incidents minimized • 100% structured daily reporting compliance Control Room & Reporting Discipline • Establish central operational control structure • Implement daily operational reports and monthly dashboards • Ensure data accuracy and audit-ready documentation Subcontractor & SLA Enforcement • Monitor shuttle and towing contractors • Enforce SLA penalties and performance reviews • Ensure compliance with insurance, staffing, vehicle standards, and cleanliness • Prevent unauthorized subcontracting Workforce Discipline & Culture • Establish professional command structure • Train supervisors on structured reporting • Implement attendance control and productivity tracking • Develop middle management capability First 6-Month Deliverables • Complete SOP manual issued • KPI dashboard operational • Daily reporting standardized • SLA enforcement structure active • Reduction in operational incidents • Improved traffic flow metric
